Text: At its meeting on 28 March 2025, the Committee, in the light of the State Party’s request that the Committee discontinue consideration of the communication, given the termination of the criminal case against the author in the Russian Federation on 12 July 2020, pursuant to which the author is no longer at risk of extradition, and the lack of objection on the part of the author, decided to discontinue the consideration of communication No. 2779/2016.
